hero.title: Discover City Guide
hero.subtitle: Explore the world with confidence. We find the best for you.
hero.description: Planning a trip should be exciting, not overwhelming. At Discover City Guide we research, analyse and select the best hotels, experiences and places in each city so you can enjoy your trip from the very first moment.
hero.noDestinationsSubtitle: Try searching for cities like Mallorca, Barcelona or Lisbon

appPromotion.title: Take Discover City Guide in your pocket
appPromotion.description: Access all our guides, offline maps and personalised recommendations from your phone. Plan and enjoy your trip without any hassle.
appPromotion.feature1Description: Access all maps without an internet connection
appPromotion.feature2Description: Save your favourite places and create personalised itineraries
appPromotion.feature3Description: Receive notifications about hotel and experience discounts
appPromotion.comingSoon: Coming soon – be the first to discover it.

philosophy.title: Our philosophy
philosophy.description:
At Discover City Guide we believe every trip is an opportunity to discover something new: a culture, a history or a place you will remember for the rest of your life.



That is why we create clear, practical and honest guides that help travellers make better decisions.



Our goal is simple: save you hours of research and help you find the best experiences in every destination.



When we recommend a hotel, a tour or an activity, we do so after researching and comparing options to make sure they truly add value to your trip.



If you choose to book through our links, you will not pay anything extra. You simply help us keep creating useful content for travellers like you.



Because more than showing destinations, we want to help you truly live them.

principles.title: Our principles
principles.description: Every recommendation follows these core values
principles.card1Description: Every recommendation is designed to help you have the best experience possible.
principles.card2Description: We analyse hundreds of options to show you only what is truly worth it.
principles.card3Description: Clear, straightforward and useful information so you can plan your trip easily.
principles.card4Description: Some links may generate a small commission, but our recommendations are always based on quality and value for the traveller.

closingCTA.title: Your next adventure starts with a great guide
closingCTA.description: Discover incredible cities, find perfect accommodation and book unforgettable experiences with Discover City Guide.
